candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; valid fallback if needed.
Not revenue; gross profit subtotal.

variables.notes: Use the first available revenue label by priority; do not sum them.

candidates.why: Direct cost of goods sold / cost of sales line.
Duplicate total cost of sales line with identical values; less preferred than the direct line.
Balancing row excludes disclosed depreciation/amortization and should not be preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS line, not duplicate total or balancing rows.

candidates.why: Separate above-EBIT R&D expense line; include in SG&A components so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Core selling overhead component.
Core administrative overhead component.
Operating overhead bucket; excludes totals and income lines.
Underlying gross R&D spending, but the explicit expense line is better.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected operating overhead components and included the separate above-EBIT R&D expense line per the XSGA-XRD rule. Excluded depreciation/amortization subrows, balancing rows, totals, and income/mixed rows.

candidates.why: Best dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line; appears to be the net P&L R&D expense.
Gross spending, not the final expense recognized in P&L.
Capitalization adjustment, not standalone R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of Research and development
candidates.why: Only one component of recognized R&D expense.
Impairment component, not the core R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line. It is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes R&D as intended.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest financing cost; include as separate component.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses related to provision for post-employment benefts
candidates.why: Recurring interest/unwinding cost where reported; may be included when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest effect from the measurement of repurchase obligations
candidates.why: Interest-like financing cost, but only appears in one year.
Broader finance-cost total; not preferred when granular components are available.
Mixed financial expense bucket that may include non-interest items; avoid if possible.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest expenses related to provision for post-employment benefts
Interest effect from the measurement of repurchase obligations

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring interest-related components over broader finance-cost totals. Excluded mixed/valuation/FX-oriented finance rows to avoid contamination and double counting.

candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line; excludes non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Semantically identical owner equity label; valid fallback if populated in some periods.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interests line.
Equivalent minority-interest label; valid fallback.
Income-statement attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: R:nc. Used balance-sheet minority/NCI labels as a priority list; do not sum them. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Non-controllinginterests
